name: Compiler and Language Implementation
description: 编译器开发:解析、IR、代码生成与优化

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['compiler','parser','ir','codegen','optimization'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/(lexer|parser|abstract syntax tree|\bast\b|intermediate representation|\bir\b|code generation|compiler pass|type checker|llvm)/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
